Name: Beck's Brewery Brawl
Description: Initiate a battle on a space. Both players must discard 1 random card before rolling. The winner draws 2 cards from the deck.

Name: Brain Fog
Description: Discard 2 Action Cards.

Name: Bremen Cathedral Shelter
Description: Prevent defeat.

Name: Change of Plans
Description: Reroll the dice.

Name: Chao Phraya Current
Description: Prevent defeat.

Name: Chatuchak Discovery
Description: Draw 3 cards, keep 1.

Name: Clairvoyance
Description: Look at another player's hand.

Name: Cross-Country Flight
Description: Teleport to any space within 3 spaces.

Name: Dejavu
Description: Choose any Good Card effect from the discard pile and use it immediately.

Name: Double Booking
Description: Force another player to Battle twice in a row on the same space.

Name: Echoes of the Past
Description: Return a card to the deck and draw new one.

Name: Epiphany
Description: Draw 2 cards and keep both.

Name: Fading Horizon
Description: Cancel the Claim of 1 target space, returning it to an empty space.

Name: Fading Recollection
Description: Retreat from a battle without losses.

Name: Familiar Turf
Description: Steal a space claimed by another player and make it yours.

Name: Flashback
Description: Undo the last completed action.

Name: Fleeting Thought
Description: Move +1 space this turn.

Name: Found coin on the Footpath
Description: When rolling dice for a Battle, add +2 to your total roll.

Name: Hijack
Description: Make enemy territory neutral by duel from anywhere.

Name: Inner Peace
Description: Ignore all negative effects until your next turn (including battle).

Name: Intuition
Description: Cancel another player's Action Card immediately.

Name: Itinerary Planning
Description: Look at the top 5 deck cards and reorder them.

Name: Leaving Baggage Behind
Description: Force all players (including yourself) to discard 1 card.

Name: Lost in the Crowd
Description: If you lose this battle, instead of taking damage or losing a territory, swap physical board positions with the winning player.

Name: Lost Passport Panic
Description: If you win this battle, the loser cannot use any movement-related cards or special transport mechanics on their next turn.

Name: Lucidity
Description: Win ties in all battles this round.

Name: Market Square Peace
Description: Cancel an action of the enemy.

Name: Memory Theft
Description: x

Name: Mental Backlash
Description: An opponent's Action Card affects them instead of you.

Name: Missed the Stop
Description: Move backward 1 space without encountering events or enemies.

Name: Monsoon Downpour
Description: Cancel an enemy's battle card

Name: Muddled Minds
Description: Swap your hand with another player.

Name: Packed Bags
Description: Return everyone's hand to the deck and redraw.

Name: Pickpocket
Description: Randomly steal 1 card from another player's hand.

Name: Putting Down Roots
Description: Anyone trying to capture it must win 2 battles.

Name: Repression
Description: Drop two cards and reflect enemy effects back.

Name: Rest Stop
Description: Draw 2 Cards immediately.

Name: Restricted Area
Description: Prevent your space from being attacked or captured by others for 1 turn.

Name: Roland's Stature
Description: Protect the character from being pushed or warped by cards.

Name: Sanctuary
Description: Warp yourself to the nearest Empty Space immediately.

Name: Sanctuary of the Mind
Description: Cannot be attacked until your next turn.

Name: Second Wind
Description: Gain an extra turn immediately.

Name: Serendipity
Description: Choose any card from the deck and play it.

Name: Serenity Citizens' Park
Description: Forbid all players from using Action Cards on this turn

Name: Siam Traffic Stall
Description: This turn, all movement-related cards have double effect.

Name: Soi Labyrinth
Description: Your first movement this turn is cancelled.

Name: Souvenir Swap
Description: Steal random card

Name: Stolen Journal
Description: Look at a player's hand. They must give you one card or lose 3 territories.

Name: Street Photo Mimic
Description: Copy the effect of the last card used by someone.

Name: Sudden Clarity
Description: Ignore effects from card.

Name: Synapse Leap
Description: Teleport to an adjacent empty space.

Name: The Last Stand
Description: Bet all your currently held action cards on this battle. If you win, double the card. If you lose, discard your entire hand.

Name: Tourist Trap
Description: Place a trap forcing anyone who lands on this space to stop moving for 1 turn.

Name: Town Musicians Tactics
Description: Ignore the result of a lost battle once.

Name: Train of Thought
Description: Move +2 space this turn.

Name: Travel Guidebook
Description: Player can see next three card

Name: Universum Paradox
Description: The player with the lower battle score wins the engagement.

Name: Wanderlust
Description: Jump over 1 space.
